sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the current state more carefully
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Current nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ['W', 'w', 'S', 'b', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center_row = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_col = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  {n['color']} at ({center_row}, {center_col}), pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Click on the cross at (16, 26) to see where it wants to jump
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 16, 'col': 26}])

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
nodes2 = seg2['nodes']
print("\nAfter clicking (16, 26):")
for n in nodes2:
    if n['color'] not in ['W', 'w', 'S', 'b', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center_row = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_col = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  {n['color']} at ({center_row}, {center_col}), pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

        center_row = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_col = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  {n['color']} at ({center_row}, {center_col}), pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Click on the cross at (16, 26) to see where it wants to jump
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 16, 'col': 26}])

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
nodes2 = seg2['nodes']
print("\nAfter clicking (16, 26):")
for n in nodes2:
    if n['color'] not in ['W', 'w', 'S', 'b', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center_row = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_col = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  {n['color']} at ({center_row}, {center_col}), pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
